ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset associated with the data */,
  "wt1" REAL /* Weighted metric 1 */,
  "wt2" REAL /* Weighted metric 2 */,
  "wt3" REAL /* Weighted metric 3 */,
  "unp1" REAL /* Unpredicted metric 1 */,
  "unp2" REAL /* Unpredicted metric 2 */,
  "unp3" REAL /* Unpredicted metric 3 */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "source" INTEGER /* Source of the data */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Data quality score */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., time-series, categorical) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the asset belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("source") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., stock, bond, commodity) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the asset belongs to */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the asset belongs to */,
  "geographic_region" TEXT /* Geographic region where the asset is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regression_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regression model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the regression model */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the regression model (e.g., linear, logistic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regression model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used in the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Hyperparameters of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regression_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, financial analyst) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model input */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regression model */,
  "data_column" TEXT /* Name of the data column used as input */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight assigned to the input in the model */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data used in the input (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_inputs_data_column FOREIGN KEY ("data_column") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model output */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regression model */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data record */,
  "prediction" REAL /* Predicted value based on the model */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regression model */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the model */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the updates made to the model */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Detailed log of changes made to the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regression model */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has to the model (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data-quality_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data record */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue found in the data */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution for the issue */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the issue */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the issue was resolved */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the issue (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regression model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user contributing to the model */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the contribution was made */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regression model */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., accuracy, precision) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "evaluation_method" TEXT /* Method used to evaluate the model's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regression model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the regression model */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_tags_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES regression_models ("model_id")
)
